Title: User can log in
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the valid username and password
3. Click the login button

Title: User can view the menu
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Verify that the menu is displayed

Title: User can place an order
Preconditions: User is logged in and the menu is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Select the desired menu item(s)
3. Click the "Add to Order" button
4. Verify that the selected item(s) are added to the order
5. Click the "Place Order" button

Title: User can view their order
Preconditions: User is logged in and has placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Verify that the order is displayed

Title: User can process payment
Preconditions: User is logged in, has placed an order, and the order is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Click the "Process Payment" button
3. Enter the payment information
4. Click the "Submit Payment" button

Title: User cannot log in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User enters invalid username or password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter the invalid username or password
3. Click the login button

Title: User cannot place an order without logging in
Preconditions: User is not logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Attempt to place an order

Title: User cannot view their order without logging in
Preconditions: User is not logged in
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the order page

Title: User cannot process payment without placing an order
Preconditions: User is logged in but has not placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Attempt to process payment

Title: User can cancel an order
Preconditions: User is logged in and has placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Click the "Cancel Order" button

Title: User cannot cancel an order that has already been processed
Preconditions: User is logged in, has placed an order, and the order has been processed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Attempt to cancel the order

Title: Restaurant can view the menu
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Verify that the menu is displayed

Title: Restaurant can process payment
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational and has received an order
Test Steps:
1. Receive the order
2. Process the payment

Title: Restaurant cannot process payment without receiving an order
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational but has not received an order
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to process payment

Title: Menu can be viewed by users and restaurants
Preconditions: User or restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Verify that the menu is displayed

Title: Order can be placed by users
Preconditions: User is logged in and the menu is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Select the desired menu item(s)
3. Click the "Add to Order" button
4. Verify that the selected item(s) are added to the order
5. Click the "Place Order" button

Title: Order cannot be placed without selecting any menu items
Preconditions: User is logged in and the menu is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Attempt to place an order

Title: Payment can be processed by users
Preconditions: User is logged in, has placed an order, and the order is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Click the "Process Payment" button
3. Enter the payment information
4. Click the "Submit Payment" button

Title: Payment cannot be processed with invalid payment information
Preconditions: User is logged in, has placed an order, and the order is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Click the "Process Payment" button
3. Enter the invalid payment information
4. Click the "Submit Payment" button

Title: Payment cannot be processed without placing an order
Preconditions: User is logged in but has not placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Attempt to process payment

Title: Order can be cancelled by users
Preconditions: User is logged in and has placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Click the "Cancel Order" button

Title: Order cannot be cancelled after it has been processed
Preconditions: User is logged in, has placed an order, and the order has been processed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Attempt to cancel the order

Title: Order can be viewed by users
Preconditions: User is logged in and has placed an order
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the order page
2. Verify that the order is displayed

Title: Order cannot be viewed by users who have not placed an order
Preconditions: User is not logged in or has not placed an order
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the order page

Title: Order can be viewed by restaurants
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational and has received an order
Test Steps:
1. Receive the order
2. Verify that the order is displayed

Title: Order cannot be viewed by restaurants who have not received an order
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational but has not received an order
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to view an order

Title: Menu can be updated by restaurants
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Update the menu items
3. Save the changes

Title: Menu cannot be updated without restaurant access
Preconditions: User is not a restaurant
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to update the menu

Title: Menu cannot be updated without valid menu items
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Attempt to update the menu with invalid items

Title: Menu can be viewed by users and restaurants
Preconditions: User or restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu page
2. Verify that the menu is displayed

Title: Restaurant can view orders
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational
Test Steps:
1. Receive the order
2. Verify that the order is displayed

Title: Restaurant cannot view orders without receiving them
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational but has not received an order
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to view an order

Title: Restaurant can process multiple orders
Preconditions: Restaurant is operational and has received multiple orders
Test Steps:
1. Receive the orders
2. Process the payments for each order
Expected Result: Payments are processed successfully for each order
